headline: Synapticure Launches Groundbreaking Ataxia Care Program, Expanding Access to Specialized Neurology Nationwide
summary: Synapticure, a leading virtual care company dedicated to improving access and outcomes for patients and caregivers living with neurodegenerative diseases, today announced the launch of a virtual ataxia care program. This program can help to provide timely access to specialized care for adults living with ataxias — a group of neurological conditions characterized by progressive loss of coordination, balance, and motor function.
